name: Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough (large size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the chocolate cookie dough from the fridge and let it come to room temperature before use.
2. Scald milk in a saucepan until small bubbles form around the edges, then remove from heat.
3. Add sugar and salt to the scalded milk and stir until the sugar is completely dissolved.
4. Stir in half and half, vanilla extract, and whipping cream until combined.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
6. Follow your ice cream machine's instructions to freeze the mixture into soft ice cream.
7. Once the ice cream has gone through the entire process and is a chilled soft consistency, add the chocolate chip cookie dough.
8. Break up the dough into small clusters and drop it into the soft ice cream, stirring gently to ensure even distribution throughout.
9. Return the ice cream to the freezer for several hours until it is fully hardened.
Origin: We pretty much took our vanilla ice cream recipe and added the chocolate chip cookie dough. You can easily use Pillsbury cookie dough, but homemade is cheaper and better. Our Mrs. Field's Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough recipe makes this especially yummy!
